top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
top_signals.summary: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.

top_signals.title: Debt cycle points to stronger case for gold price: Sprott

top_signals.title: As LIV Golf faces a Saudi funding cliff, CEO says to take PIF 'at their word'
top_signals.summary: PIF is set to stop funding the golf league after the 2026 season, though O'Neil could not guarantee that the final four tournaments will take place.

top_signals.title: First Atlantic, Vema partner to unlock hydrogen potential in Newfoundland
top_signals.summary: Locally produced hydrogen at the Pipestone project could support on-site energy needs for a large-scale nickel and cobalt mining district, companies say.

top_signals.title: Windows 11 KB5094126 & KB5093998 cumulative updates released
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has released Windows 11 KB5094126 and KB5093998 cumulative updates for versions 25H2/24H2 and 23H2 to fix security vulnerabilities, bugs, and add new features. [...]
